source: cobra tree: scripts/docs/gencliref (mirrors cmd/main.go root flags + server|agent|migrate|config)

flags.name: billing-api-key
flags.usage: Billing service API key (required when billing is enabled)

flags.name: billing-url
flags.usage: Billing service URL (required when billing is enabled)

flags.name: enable-feature-flag
flags.usage: List of feature flags to enable e.g. "full-text-search,prometheus"

flags.name: enable-profiling
flags.usage: Enable profiling and exporting profile data to pyroscope

flags.name: ip-allow-list
flags.usage: List of IPs CIDRs to allow e.g. " 0.0.0.0/0,127.0.0.0/8"

flags.name: ip-block-list
flags.usage: List of IPs CIDRs to block e.g. " 0.0.0.0/0,127.0.0.0/8"

flags.name: metrics-backend
flags.usage: Metrics backend e.g. prometheus. ('prometheus' feature flag required

flags.name: metrics-prometheus-materialized-view-refresh-interval
flags.usage: Materialized view refresh interval in minutes

flags.name: metrics-prometheus-query-timeout
flags.usage: Prometheus metrics query timeout in seconds

flags.name: read-replicas-dsn
flags.usage: Comma-separated list of read replica DSNs e.g. postgres://convoy:convoy@host1:5436/db,postgres://convoy:convoy@host2:5437/db

flags.name: redis-addresses
flags.usage: Redis addresses (comma-separated, for cluster or sentinel)

flags.name: redis-sentinel-master-name
flags.usage: Redis Sentinel master name (required when scheme is redis-sentinel)

flags.name: root-path
flags.usage: Root path for routing behind load balancers (e.g., /convoy)

flags.name: tracer-type
flags.usage: Tracer backend, e.g. sentry, datadog or otel

flags.usage: the time interval, measured in seconds to update the in-memory store from the database
